metadata.author: Paul
metadata.subject: The Gospel of God — To Make Sinners Sons of God to Constitute the Body of Christ, Which Is Expressed as the Local Churches.

1: For I am not ashamed of the gospel, for it is the power of God unto salvation to every one who believes, both to the Jew first and to the Greek.
5: But God commends His own love to us in that while we were yet sinners, Christ died for us.
8: There is now then no condemnation to those who are in Christ Jesus.
For the law of the Spirit of life has freed me in Christ Jesus from the law of sin and of death.
12: I exhort you therefore, brothers, through the compassions of God to present your bodies a living sacrifice, holy, well pleasing to God, which is your thoughtful service.

2.text: The law of the Spirit of life is the natural energy and power of the divine life that spontaneously overcomes the downward pull of the law of sin.

5.text: The goal of our salvation is not just to go to heaven, but to become functioning members of the organic Body of Christ.
